title: ai agent trading crypto?
author: ok-hacker
selftext:
Hey guys,

just stumbled upon this new platform called andmilo, and I’m honestly impressed with what they’ve built. Once you activate the “Auto Trader” mode, there’s an AI agent that literally trades 24/7, analyzing, adjusting strategies, and executing without you needing to babysit it.

I’ve been testing it for about a week and it feels way more autonomous than the usual signal bots.  
Anything else out there that gives the same experience?

https://preview.redd.it/hchfwzpwi3tf1.png?width=3376&format=png&auto=webp&s=c20c83e1313b069a377666e7d4a1c921b98e1e42

comments.author: AttitudeGrouchy33
comments.body: the best auto trader on the Solana chain by far....

comments.author: Alarming_League_2035
comments.body: Have a look at $agent on cardano (built by fluxpointstudio) they've built an entire platform (ADAM) and have their own dex (which they're currently upgrading/ working on) and T is cross chain to solana / base / cardano.
